name_cn:
『Celine Celine』
Capsule Collection Launch❤️ 2022 SS New Colors~
Triomphe Mini Tote. The Triumph logo is embroidered with gold thread on the Monogram base, giving a strong sense of logo presence and understated luxury! Considered a versatile match, this small bag is just too cute . For all the fashion lovers, stop being charmed by its charm.
Style No.: 193302, Material: Gold thread
Size: 17-20-6
